_comment: Maps region -> the user's REAL Chrome profile directory. We point Playwright directly at the live profile (not a clone) because Chrome 127+ App-Bound Encryption ties the cookie key to the user_data_dir PATH -- any clone to a new path silently fails to decrypt cookies, breaking auth. The cost: the user's real Chrome must be CLOSED for this profile when scrapers run. Scrapers check for the lockfile and skip with a clear message if Chrome is open.
